goal: Work the weighted .evolve/inbox backlog top-down: for each cycle, implement the fleet-assigned inbox item (triage top_n is the sole task authority; scout scopes discovery to that item, never proposes alternative tasks). Priorities: chronicle-s2-digest-writer, chronicle-s3-digest-wiring, chronicle-s6-escalation-boundary, all-families-exhausted-checkpoint-defer, tdd-topn-binding-gate, ship-stage-explicit-paths, chronicle-s7a-historian-shadow. Preserve every phase-integrity guarantee and gate behavior.
